eyebrow: GoalOS Mission OS — The Proof OS for Autonomous AI Work
hero: Set the objective. GoalOS runs until proof is done.
subhero: Turn high-stakes objectives into governed decision states: Evidence Dockets, verifier reports, risk ledgers, executive briefs, action graphs, Chronicle entries, and reusable capability packages.

sections.title: Beyond research
sections.body: Mission OS is more than deep research or reports because every output is packaged with claims, evidence, provenance, contradictions, risks, validation, action, Chronicle memory, and a public claim boundary.

sections.title: How it works
sections.body: Objective → Mission Contract → Autonomous Work → Verification → Evidence Docket → Governed Decision State → Action Graph → Chronicle.

sections.title: What you receive
sections.body: Evidence Docket, Claims Matrix, Source Provenance, Contradiction Register, Verifier Report, Risk Ledger, Executive Brief, Decision Deck, Action Graph, Chronicle Entry, and Capability Package.

sections.title: For regular people
sections.body: Pick one objective. Let GoalOS structure it. Get a proof-backed plan and action graph that remains human-reviewed.

sections.title: For teams
sections.body: Turn recurring strategic work into repeatable proof-backed missions with reusable capability packages.

sections.title: For enterprises
sections.body: Create a governed system of record for AI-assisted decisions and autonomous work.

sections.title: AGIALPHA settlement readiness
sections.body: $AGIALPHA is not the product. Verified work is the product. $AGIALPHA is proof-settlement fuel. Mission OS produces readiness by default and does not move tokens.

sections.title: FAQ
sections.body: Mission OS creates proof-backed governed decision states; it does not claim legal advice, financial advice, production safety, Mainnet deployment, AGI, ASI, or guaranteed outcomes.
